title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert Oracle database data types (VARCHAR2, NUMBER, DATE) to PostgreSQL equivalents. The video shows how Gemini provides both automated conversion and explanations to help developers learn PostgreSQL migration patterns.
